name: Phase 10
description: Phase 10 is Mattel's classic rummy-style card game where players race to complete ten increasingly tricky "phases" — sets, runs, all-one-color, and combinations of these — in strict order. Each round, lay down only the current phase, then unload your hand on opponents' melds; score points from leftover cards and proceed only when your phase is done. Long, lucky, and stubbornly addictive.
